title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. isocoma
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. isocoma is a subspecies of the Pilosella aurantiaca plant, commonly known as a type of dandelion or hawkweed. This plant is often used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. isocoma include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in topical creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
